summary: A generic container component that can hold any operators inside it. The foundation for building reusable modules, custom components, and organizational hierarchy.

key_params.name: externaltox
key_params.note: Path to an external .tox file to load/save this component

key_params.name: enablecloning
key_params.note: Enable cloning from a master component

key_params.name: extension1
key_params.note: Python extension class to attach to this component

common_gotchas: External .tox references are not auto-saved — you must explicitly save or enable auto-export.
Extensions are initialized on component creation; changing the extension class requires reinitializing.
